stemHtml: High Level Airspace (HLA) extends vertically between which flight levels and what are the reduced vertical separation minimum that can be used?

options.a: FL285 and FL420, reduced from 2000 to 1000 ft.
options.b: FL280 and FL410, reduced from 2000 to 1000 ft.
options.c: FL285 and FL420, reduced from 1000 to 500 ft.
options.d: FL280 and FL410, reduced from 1000 to 500 ft.
